prerequisites.value: Dodge, Mobility, Small size or smaller.

description.value: **Benefit:** You receive a +4 dodge bonus on Acrobatics checks to move past opponents without provoking attacks of opportunity, so long as they are larger than you. In addition, you gain a +2 dodge bonus to Armor Class against attacks of opportunity caused when you move out of or within a larger opponentâs threatened area (this stacks with the +4 bonus provided by Mobility, for a total bonus of +6).
